title: Creative Converting Happi Tree Owls Lunch Napkins I Paper I 2 Ply I 16 Pcs, Multi
features: PACKAGE INCLUDES: 16 happi tree lunch napkins multicolor paper 2 ply 33cm (13")
ADORABLE DESIGN: These plates feature a mama owl and a baby owl perching on a tree filled with colorful flowers.
PERFECT FOR ANY OCCASION: The napkins are perfect for gender neutral baby showers or birthdays.

ECO-FRIENDLY MATERIALS: Made of triple-ply tissue and printed with non-toxic, water-soluble dyes and food-safe ink. They are made using environmentally-conscious raw materials, which ensures they are biodegradable.
HIGHLY ABSORBENT: The 2-Ply construction provides extra strength and absorbency so they can last through a meal.
description: A clean forest is a happy forest! Keep your Happi Tree baby shower spotless and smiling by making sure you have these sturdy and colorful Happi Tree Lunch Napkins on hand for your baby shower guests. These paper napkins have been printed with a lovable scene sure to melt everyone’s hearts as they celebrate the mommy-to-be. Transform your baby shower into a forest of delights by filling your event with more baby shower party supplies and decorations in this colorful theme for celebrating baby boys or baby girls.
